nasb.text: They were there with David three days, eating and drinking, for their kinsmen had prepared for them.

esv.text: And they were there with David for three days, eating and drinking, for their brothers had made preparation for them.

cnv.text: 他們在那裡三天，與大衛在一起吃喝，因為他們的親族給他們預備好了。

ccb.text: 他们在那里与大卫一起吃喝了三天，因为他们的亲族为他们预备了食物。
